feat.name: Resounding Blow
feat.requirement: You are wielding a melee weapon that deals bludgeoning damage.
feat.text: You strike your enemy in the head with such force that its ears ring. Make a melee Strike. If the Strike hits and deals damage, the target is deafened until the start of your next turn (or for 1 minute on a critical hit).

traits.name: Barbarian
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the barbarian class.
